craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beds: Studio Baths: 1 Square Feet: 450 Follow The Link Below: https://amc.touraptnow.com/vpmnoz Modern Living in the Land of Enchantment Call Now - show contact info x 5 OR Text 5 to show contact info to text our leasing team.   Community Info Find your new home and your sense of adventure at Puerta del Sol Apartments in fascinating Albuquerque! With wood-burning fireplaces, generous storage space, and fully-equipped kitchens, you can eat well and live well in any of our 1 or 2 bedroom apartments. Conveniently located on the west side of Albuquerque, our apartments are within walking distance of restaurants and grocery stores, not far from Desert Greens Golf Course and Cottonwood Mall, and just a short drive from your next adventure. In under five minutes, you can be hiking in Piedras Marcadas Canyon or take a twenty-minute drive to discover Petroglyph National Monument or explore Old Town. Come home and take advantage of our fitness center and heated swimming pool and then rest and rejuvenate while enjoying the view from your private covered balcony. With so much to do and discover nearby, let Puerta del Sol apartments help you combine your love of exploring beautiful landscapes with a convenient location and cozy place to call home. Residence Features ✩  Views ✩  A Must See ✩  Balcony/Patio ✩  Fireplaces ✩  AC ✩  Fully Equipped Kitchen ✩  High Speed Net ✩  Extra Storage Community Features ✩  Laundry Facilities ✩  Fitness Center ✩  Swimming Pool ✩  2 Playgrounds ✩  24 Hour Maintenance ✩  BBQ Grills ✩  Picnic Area ✩  Tour Today ✩  Great Location ✩  Professional & Responsive Management Pet Policy Please call the leasing office for details. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 8:30AM-5:30PM Prices are subject to change, based on availability and qualification of the applicant, additional fees may apply. Equal Housing Opportunity Xm0gnV9Y6ZHo

craigslist.title: Find your rhythm. Our 1 BR, 1 BA is a game-changer.
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Casa de Encantada Leasing Office: 7780 Paseo 550 Dr NE Rio Rancho, NM 87144 Call us for more information! show contact info Take a look at what Casa de Encantada has to offer! Discover the sights and delights of Rio Rancho, New Mexico, from an ideal vantage point at Casa de Encantada Apartments. Located in a quiet area off Highway 550, you'll be surrounded by parks and trails with the convenience of shops and restaurants just down the road. Check off your shopping list at Albertsons Market or Walmart Supercenter, enjoy a walk along Enchanted Hills Path, and entertain yourself at Santa Ana Star Casino. Stop by and see why Casa de Encantada Apartments is the perfect spot for playing and relaxing in Sandoval County. Receive One Month FREE + Waived Application Fees When You Lease by 2/28/2026!* *Restrictions apply. Please contact the leasing office for details. Rental Information: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bathroom / 575 sq ft Monthly Price: $1096 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Lease Terms: 6-Month, 12-Month Apartment Amenities: ❖ Air Conditioning ❖ Cable Ready ❖ Dishwasher ❖ Microwave ❖ Refrigerator Additional Information: ❖ Clubhouse ❖ Elevator ❖ Fitness Center Leasing Hours: Mon - Fri: 8:30 AM - 5:30 PM Call us for more information! show contact info Pet Policy: Casa de Encantada Apartments welcomes pets as part of our commitment to creating a warm and inviting environment for all. Your pets will love our spacious homes and nearby trails and green spaces as much as you do. Contact our leasing agents for more information about life with your pet at Casa de Encantada Apartments. Website: www.leaseaptsnow.com?n=casa_de_encantada&rp=dHUsZBTfooc5&t=wb Online Application: www.leaseaptsnow.com?n=casa_de_encantada&rp=dHUsZBTfooc5&t=ap Income Restrictions for Casa de Encantada # Occupants   -   Max Income       1 Person   -   $36,300       2 People   -   $41,520       3 People   -   $46,680       4 People   -   $51,840       5 People   -   $56,040 To qualify, annual income must be equal or below those in the chart, based on the total number of occupants. Contact the leasing office for more information. All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice. EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY 33GI9ETTKXDN7N85
